body_txt: A family full of eccentric, weird, sometimes insane relatives. Preferably all of them, but as long as it's the majority of them then it's okay. Commonly, it's all of them except the Only Sane Man or the Black Sheep (or White Sheep , depending on the circumstances). Someone may observe their... "activities," but when they confront the family about this, the said family will often have no idea that they are considered to be out of the ordinary. Sometimes Truth in Television , as many mental conditions have at least some genetic component, most notably autism. Though, don't expect the examples here to portray neurodivergency well , or really any specific kind of neurodivergency at all . See also Big, Screwed-Up Family . Villainous Lineage is the darker version of this, while Heroic Lineage is the more, well, heroic version. The Professional Wrestling version of the trope is, of course, Wrestling Family . When a parent doesn’t want the child to take up after the family see Save You From Becoming Your Parent or the inversion of Follow in My Footsteps . See Turning Into Your Parent when the character realizes they have become like one of their parents. Compare Shared Family Quirks and Lineage Comes from the Father .
